exploration_notes: The alerting scheduler tick is implemented across three files. ticker/ticker.go generates time ticks on a channel. schedule.go's schedulePeriodic() consumes these ticks and calls processTick() which determines ready rules, then runJobFn() dispatches evaluations. alert_rule.go's Eval() method detects overruns via a non-blocking channel read: if a previous evaluation is still pending, the dropped tick is returned. runJobFn() then logs 'Tick dropped because alert rule evaluation is too slow' and in
